visual: Pivots the body, deflects with a backfist, parries with an open hand, then steps into a bow stance delivering a straight fist punch at mid-level.
motion_description: The weight shifts onto the rear leg as the torso pivots approximately 180 degrees to the right, sweeping both extended arms downward and across the body. The right hand forms a fist and arcs outward into a mid-level backfist as the right foot lightly steps forward, then retracts to the hip while the left open hand extends forward to parry. The left foot then steps out into a forward bow stance, shifting the weight onto the front leg as the right arm delivers a straight, mid-level punch, with the left hand resting near the right elbow, completing the sequence in a slow, continuous flow.
